title: Make embed code available for dashboards
excerpt:
Embed code is only available for views inside a board. But when you create a dedicated dashboard it’s not possible to embed it (on for example Sharepoint) while options like sharing and present mode are available. 
My su…

posts.author: HBHoekie (Hugo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Embed code is only available for views inside a board. But when you create a dedicated dashboard it’s not possible to embed it (on for example Sharepoint) while options like sharing and present mode are available.

My suggestion is to complement the dashboard sharing options with the embed code.

Thanks!

posts.author: cristy.thomas (Cristy Thomas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I want to do the same, embed a dashboard that is pulling information from several other boards across my organisation as a calendar so I can display it dynamically within SharePoint.
I started with trying to synch the tasks to an Outlook calendar which doesn’t work anyway and would have required unnecessary work for all of the board owners.
Is this functionality being worked on? If so how far off is it from being available please?
Thank you

posts.author: kat.k (Kat K)
posts.cookedHtml: I can’t believe this still isn’t a feature. Monday please make it possible to embed dashboards. It’s a massive hindrance to not be able to.

posts.author: mgross (Marissa Gross)
posts.cookedHtml: Would love to be able to embed monday dashboards in Sharepoint
